title: Stupid Info
body:
Simply displaying information in various places. For example, in the action bar.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb578db74b911bdd6759e9fe959fec7790390532.jpeg)

To display information, simply enter the command `/stupidinfo toggle <args>`.

### What can be output:
- Coords
- GameTime
- RealTime
- Rotation



### To hide the information you want, simply enter the command again.
